Active Projects

What we're
building

From street-level campaigns to Hollywood anniversary projects — Mid City Sound is always creating. Here's what's in the works.

Coming Soon

Streetbeats

A New Orleans Beatmaking Platform

Streetbeats is the next creative frontier from Mid City Sound — a platform rooted in New Orleans street culture, designed for producers, beatmakers, and listeners who live and breathe the city's sonic identity.

Launching soon. Get on the list.

Get Notified

Highlights

  • Beat licensing & distribution
  • New Orleans producer spotlight
  • Sample packs rooted in NOLA culture
  • Collaboration tools
Live

Lil Squiggle

#DontDrinkAndDialDecades

#DontDrinkAndDialDecades is a reggae-dub chibi Lego creative campaign centered on the character Lil Squiggle — one call, every era, same regret.

The campaign spans music, merch, TikTok, and beyond. Collaborators: Donny Markowitz, Gary Uffner, Pat Smith.

@lilsquigglemon (TikTok, YouTube, X)

@lil.squiggle (Instagram)

Visit SiteShop Merch

Highlights

  • Original reggae-dub music
  • Chibi Lego character universe
  • Merch via Printful/Printify
  • TikTok & YouTube campaign
Campaign

Time of My Life — 40th

Celebrating the Dirty Dancing Legacy

In 2027, Dirty Dancing marks its 40th anniversary — and the legendary soundtrack deserves a proper celebration. Donny Markowitz was part of the original musical team, and this campaign brings that legacy back into the cultural conversation.

Details and release timeline to be announced.

Learn More

Highlights

  • 40th anniversary campaign materials
  • Original recording stories
  • Donny's session memoir
  • Anniversary edition content
Studio

Do It Again

Curren$y & Wiz Khalifa

Tracked live at Mid City Sound Studios, Do It Again brings together two of Hip Hop's most prolific collaborators — Curren$y and Wiz Khalifa — in New Orleans for a project that feels like a homecoming.

Produced under Donny's supervision with the full Mid City Sound approach: real room, real vibe.

Stay Tuned

Highlights

  • Recorded live at Mid City Sound
  • Produced by Donny Markowitz
  • New Orleans session musicians
  • Release TBD

Have a project in mind?

We're selective about what we take on — but we love a good pitch. Reach out and let's see if we're the right fit.
